title: LEGAL HELP DESK - 211info
text: LAMBDA LEGAL LEGAL HELP DESK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information and resources regarding discrimination related to sexual orientation, gender identity and expression, and HIV status; inquiries are kept confidential. Assistance may include follow-up discussions with Lambda Legal attorneys or contact information for an attorney in the area or for other organizations that may directly assist. The Help Desk cannot provide legal advice. 120 Wall Street 19th Floor New York, NY 100053919 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (213) 382-7600 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Message Phone (213) 382-7600 Western Regional Office Help Desk Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to fill out a Contact the Help Desk form or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Legal Information Services * AIDS/HIV Issues Legal Information Services * LGBTQ2+ Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LAMBDA LEGAL
